name: 終極身份反轉
description: 結尾揭露女主根本不是富家親女兒，而是為被害母親復仇的局外人。整個故事的前提被顛覆，觀眾意識到女主的每一步都是精心計算的復仇棋局，衝擊力極強。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: My story's finished. I should go. ... Who are you really? I'm the daughter seeking justice for her mother.
